scoring: v3 (aligned backtest engine with paper trading)

changes: Removed taker_ratio, ls_ratio, fear_greed from backtest engine
Updated OI weight from 0.5 to 0.25 per sub-weight
Updated audit_backtest_quality.py to use v3 weights

step_1_2_audit.insight: LONG WR varies wildly by regime (47% BULL vs 69% FLAT). SHORT WR stable 58-71%.

step_1_3_direction.insight: Both directions have edge. Asymmetric +2.0 boosts LONG WR to 72% but loses $2K total PnL.

step_1_4_breakeven.result: All breakeven configs reduce PnL vs baseline. BE converts SL losses to small losses but also kills winning trades early. Best: BE_12bars_1.0pct = $12,022 (still -$2,099 vs baseline).

step_1_5_sltp_grid.conclusion: Wider SL/TP improves PnL by $1.4K. Best balance: SL 3.0 / TP 5.0 ($15,300, Sharpe 12.42).

step_2_2_cvd.result: Zero impact - CVD data only covers Mar 9-15 (6 days), not enough to overlap with Jan-Mar OOS
step_2_2_cvd.action: Wait for more data collection (need 2-4 weeks)

step_2_3_dvol.result: Zero impact - DVOL data only covers Mar 9-15 (6 days), same issue

step_2_4_macro.result: Zero impact - Macro data only 6 rows (Mar 6-13), same issue

step_2_5_confidence.insight: Filters improve WR (64%->70%) but reduce PnL. Best tradeoff: RSI+Pos filter (WR 67%, PnL -$906).

immediate_deploy: Update SL from 2.5 to 3.0, TP from 4.0 to 5.0 (expected +$1.2K, Sharpe 12.42)
Consider RSI+Pos filter for paper trading (WR boost, small PnL cost)
wait_for_data: CVD, DVOL, Macro factors need 2-4 weeks more data before retesting
Per-coin funding/OI now collecting - build per-coin factor in ~2 weeks
do_not_deploy: Volume filter alone - REJECTED (too aggressive, kills $3K PnL)
